message:
fix: recent_events card guideline compliance (search, skeleton, hook wiring) (#3171)

- Add CardSearchInput for event filtering (G1)
- Replace raw Skeleton with CardSkeleton component (G9)
- Add isRefreshing to useCardLoadingState for refresh animation (G10)

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
